{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Seishen Lords
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The family has been searching for the [[Seishen Lords]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
